header.title: Image Compressor — Reduce Image File Size Online Free
header.description: Free online image compressor to reduce image file size while preserving quality. Compress JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF images with adjustable compression levels. Optimize images for web, email, and storage — 100% client-side.
header.keywords: image compressor, compress image, reduce image size, image optimizer, compress jpg, compress png, image file size reducer, photo compressor

dropzone.formatsSupported: JPG, PNG, WebP · Multiple files supported

options.title: Compression Options
options.targetSizeDesc: Uses binary search to find the best quality that fits the target.

howToUse.title: How to Use Image Compressor
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag and drop one or more images onto the compressor.
howToUse.step2Desc: Select By Quality for direct control or By Size to target a specific file size.
howToUse.step3Desc: Set quality level, output format, max dimensions, and strip metadata if needed.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click Compress All, compare sizes, then download individually or as a zip.

items.question: How much can I compress an image?
items.answer: It depends on the image content and format. Typically you can reduce file size by 50-80% without noticeable quality loss.

items.question: What is the difference between By Quality and By Size?
items.answer: By Quality lets you set a fixed quality level. By Size uses binary search to find the optimal quality that meets your target file size.

items.question: Does compression reduce image dimensions?
items.answer: By default, no. But you can enable the Limit Width option to resize during compression.

items.question: What does Strip Metadata do?
items.answer: It removes EXIF data, camera info, and other metadata from the image to reduce file size.

items.question: Can I compress multiple images at once?
items.answer: Yes. Upload multiple images and compress them all in one click.

items.question: Is the compression lossless?
items.answer: Lossy compression reduces quality. For maximum quality, use high quality settings or lossless formats like PNG.

examples.title: Try an Example
examples.sampleText: Compress a high-res photo to 80% quality for fast web loading.
examples.result: A dramatically smaller file with minimal visible quality loss.
